contract_claim: vi.stubEnv('MCP_CONTAINER', 'true') is called in a test (L241) but there is no corresponding vi.unstubAllEnvs() in afterEach (L57-59). Only vi.clearAllMocks() is called, which does not restore environment variable stubs. This could cause the MCP_CONTAINER env var to leak into subsequently run tests.
observed_behavior: vi.stubEnv('MCP_CONTAINER', 'true') is called in a test (L241) but there is no corresponding vi.unstubAllEnvs() in afterEach (L57-59). Only vi.clearAllMocks() is called, which does not restore environment variable stubs. This could cause the MCP_CONTAINER env var to leak into subsequently run tests.
